image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Your brain has a limit—overload it, and you forget everything.
Context visual: This is Cognitive Load Theory. It explains how our working memory handles information.
Escalation visual: Too much info? Your brain might just shut down. Imagine trying to learn when your mind's overwhelmed.
Evidence visual: Research shows optimal learning happens when cognitive load is balanced. Less is often more.
Payoff visual: By minimizing distractions and focusing, you can boost retention. Your brain will thank you.
Cta visual: Want to learn more about how to optimize your learning? Hit that follow button!
